name: coretex-evaluator-v2-dgen1-policy-r5
_reclaimedRegionsNote: r5 PROTOCOL EPOCH: the RetrievalKeys (384-671) + Codebook (896-991) WORDS are reclaimed for typed PolicyAtoms. Their STATIC forms (dense lens, static EvidencePolicy) failed empirically — r5 reuses their words, not their semantics. Under this r5 pin, RetrievalKeys are NOT decoded as a dense lens (lens/anchor knobs INERT) and the words 384-671 read as evidence-bundle(384-511)/conflict_lifecycle(512-639)/abstention(640-671) atoms; 896-991 is reserved r5 policy capacity (MUST be zero).

firstStageTopKSelection.reason: inherited from deep-r1; calibration unchanged for the r5 epoch.

_r5PolicyNote: ★ 2026-05-29 CONSERVATIVE LAUNCH POSTURE (supersedes the 2026-05-25 lock that follows): ACTIVE reward surfaces at launch = TEMPORAL currency + TOP1-ONLY guarded abstention ONLY. evidence_bundle, conflict_lifecycle, and relation-typed/query-conditioned/conflict-intent admission are ALL scorer-OFF (flags set false above); the abstention margin is REMOVED (top1-only). These re-promote ONLY after a clean POST-FIX 300k real-Qwen run (coherent launch tree, preflight-gated) shows positive, off-family-safe lift. churn (epochFrontier C3) remains launch-required. ── HISTORICAL (pre-trim 2026-05-25 lock, NO LONGER the posture): TWO active honest public surfaces, validated on real Qwen — (B) RELATION-TYPED ROUTING and (A) GUARDED ABSTENTION. (B) = enableEvidenceBundleAtoms + policyQueryConditionedAdmission + policyRelationTypedAdmission: the host supplies the PUBLIC entity registry (policyEntityRegistry, runtime not signed); the scorer parses a PUBLIC relation-intent from the query text (parseQueryRelationIntent) and admits ONLY the matched anchor's reach along the intent-typed edges, injecting NOTHING when no relation intent parses. 3-seed real-Qwen launch validation (r5-relation-typed-validate-gpu.json): routing-slice +0.022..+0.038 all seeds, off-intent damage EXACTLY 0, overall +0.012..+0.021 vs no-atoms, random-selector 0, no-op==r4 (maxAbsDelta 0); ENTITY-only admission (no relation typing) is net -0.08..-0.10 (off-family -0.20). policyMaxBudgetEvidence clamped to 250 (beta 0.25 = the validated value; anti-flood). (A) = enableAbstentionAtoms SPLIT: miner carries the public no-evidence-path selector (MISSING_EVIDENCE + REQUIRE_NO_EVIDENCE_PATH); operator gates on top1<policyAbstentionTop1Threshold(0.9995) AND top1-top2 margin<policyAbstentionMarginThreshold(0.0003) — real-Qwen sweep cut false-abstention 8.9%->3.3% at 73% recall (r5-abstention-margin-gpu.json). RESERVED (format-decoded but scorer-OFF until separately validated): C conflict_lifecycle (enableConflictLifecycleAtoms=false; needs directional-supersedes corpus), D bundle-shape (needs graded corroboration), E cap/budget (needs deep 100k cap-binding corpus), F aspect, future typed selectors. Subject-scope/noise REMAIN RESERVED. r4 path identical + r5-no-atoms==r4 is a hard gate.
_candidateNote: DGEN-1 r5 PolicyAtom LAUNCH CANDIDATE @ 300k scale. Substrate FROZEN (commit 9fd9238): ACTIVE = (B) relation-typed routing + (A) guarded abstention (both real-Qwen launch-validated on the 9k compact corpus), enableConflictLifecycleAtoms=true + policyConflictIntentAdmission=true (3-seed validated SAFE on 9k). Scale pins for this corpus: epochFrontier.activeWindow=3072 (reserve-at-genesis = 1324, enables C3 churn from epoch 1 instead of idling until growth); majorDeltaThreshold=220 (~5% of 4396 eval_hidden). r4-substrate knobs identical to evaluator-profile-v2-dgen1-policy-r5.json. NOT FINAL-SIGNABLE until: (1) real-Qwen baseline re-pin on dgen1-r5-synth-300k (parentScorePpm + variancePpm), samples>=3 on A100; (2) bundle manifest regen with updated baseline + new corpusRoot.
_majorDeltaThresholdNote: Recalibrated 2026-05-27 to 7 = ~5% of the final launch corpus eval_hidden population (dgen1-r5-synth, 141 eval_hidden). POLICY is 5% (relative); PINNED as an absolute count (7) for THIS corpus epoch and re-pinned to 5% of the new population whenever a corpus epoch materially grows eval_hidden. Triggered ONLY by corpusRootChanged (NOT activeRoot churn — distinct triggers per epochFrontier). On growth >=7 new eval_hidden, isMajorDelta -> 1-epoch difficulty grace (threshold frozen) while the baseline recomputes on the grown corpus. At the measured churn-replenishment of ~2 eval_hidden/epoch, a 7-unit (5%) delta accumulates over ~3-4 epochs so grace fires periodically, not every epoch (avoids the perpetual-grace failure mode of a too-small threshold).
_controllerNote: Identical launch controller calibration to deep-r1 (qualityHighThresholdMult=1, rampUpMaxRatio 1.1). Sourced via controllerParamsFromProfile().
_abstentionPostureNote: top1-only guarded abstention is the launch posture (2026-05-29 reconciliation). The top1+margin operating point (policyAbstentionMarginThreshold) is REMOVED so the scorer's margin gate (retrieval-benchmark.ts confidenceOk) short-circuits to top1-only. Re-introduce a margin ONLY if a clean post-fix 300k sweep proves it beats top1-only.
_epochFrontierNote: LAUNCH-REQUIRED churn (2026-05-27). EpochFrontier C3 adaptive watermark controller; activeWindow=3072 for dgen1-r5-synth-300k, leaving 1324 eval_hidden queries in reserve at genesis so C3 can rotate from epoch 1 rather than idling until corpus growth. Aggregate-only churn (no per-query oracle); retirement by age/cohort. baselineRecompute=activeRootChanged and majorDeltaPolicy=corpusRootChanged are DISTINCT triggers. Determinism + recompute + replay reconstruction proven by scripts/churn-launch-e2e.mjs; mechanism (reserve-at-genesis rotation) by scripts/frontier-determinism-smoke.mjs.
_baselineNote: Authoritative launch baseline = 163371 ppm (variance 0, samples 3) re-pinned 2026-05-29 against dgen1-r5-synth-300k-final-corpus + -final-embeddings (corpusRoot 0x29fb84c9fa…) + Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B@e61197ed, real Qwen A100, on the CORRECTED quota-first 64-event hidden pack (all six de-collapsed families genuinely quota-satisfied: near_collision13/temporal15/multi_hop12/conflict9/aspect9/coref6; hiddenPackRoot 0x3606584d…). Sidecar: baseline-pin-300k-quotafirst.json. SUPERSEDES the earlier 153708 pin (sidecars -conservative/-quota), which was computed on the PRE-FIX 63-event pack whose quota fill was buggy (blind present++ over-counted → quotas not actually enforced → temporal-heavy pack); deriveQueryPack is now quota-first + fill-to-exact-size and the determinism gate hard-asserts coverage. Posture CONSERVATIVE (temporal + top1-only abstention; evidence/conflict/relation OFF, margin removed). 300k is the sole canonical launch corpus.
